Day-of-week difficulty: Mon fill 35%/par 110s, Fri fill 55%/par 70s. Weakest: shareability — emoji grid is hard to parse in group chats.
Re-eval under new rubric. Weakest: first-tap satisfaction — toggle lacks animation juice. Add cell scale/flash on toggle.
Re-eval. Weakest: uniqueness (flood fill exists everywhere) and aha moments. Could add animated flood wave.
Re-eval. Weakest: shareability and one-more-day pull — once solved, no replay motivation.
Re-eval. Weakest: trajectory preview reduces both decisions and skill ceiling. Consider removing preview or adding obstacles.
Re-eval. Weakest: first-tap satisfaction (no animation) and pacing (dead time when stuck). Critical bug: no solvability validation.
Re-eval. Red flag: random tap can win. Weakest: decisions (one-shot mechanic) and session pacing (watch chain, done). Needs multi-tap or scoring depth.
Re-eval. Red flag: undo makes failure impossible. Weakest: decisions (obvious biggest group) and skill ceiling. Remove undo or add move limit.
Killed — ball sort clone with no twist. Minimal strategy, no animations, weak share text.
Killed — pure reflex, zero strategy. No meaningful decisions, no aha moments. Optimal play is obvious.
Killed — red borders solve the puzzle for you. No decisions, no failure possible, trivially solved.
Remove undo + day-of-week difficulty (3-5 colors). Weakest: uniqueness (still SameGame-like) and aha moments. Next: add combo multiplier for consecutive pops that form chains.
3 taps (was 1) + day-of-week bubbles (17-25). Weakest: one-more-day pull and aha moments. Multi-tap creates real strategy around timing and prioritization.
Guaranteed solvability via DFS + bounce animations + day-of-week par (Mon 5, Fri 1). Weakest: none below 2. Arrow grid share text is distinctive.
Short aim line (no bounce preview) + day-of-week targets (4-8). Weakest: one-more-day pull. Removing preview makes aiming a real skill — predicting bounces is the game now.
Animated cell bounce on tap (all 5 affected cells pulse). d3 earns 3: cross-toggle coupling creates rich tradeoffs where every tap has unintended side effects requiring deep planning.
Two-tap select-then-pop + quadratic scoring (size²). Preview gives info to compare groups. Weakest: one-more-day pull. Aha: popping small groups to create bigger ones via gravity.
Cell-gain counts on picker (+N per button). Transforms greedy vs. strategic decisions — "+1 now enables +8 next turn" is a genuine insight. Added CelebrationBurst.
Mini-grid path map in share text (7x7 emoji: 🟢🟦⬛⭐). Weakest: one-more-day pull (binary solved/unsolved). Share text is now iconic — shows puzzle AND solution.
